name: Arm & Hammer Chocolate Chip Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease the bottom only of a 9-1/4 by 5-1/4 by 2-3/4 inch loaf pan.
2. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except for the chocolate chips and walnuts; blend well on medium speed.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips and walnuts.
5. Bake at 350°F for 60 to 65 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan.
7. Allow to cool completely.
